StockEase Documentation

API Reference and Architecture Documentation

Architektur Übersicht (Deutsch)

Systemdesign, Schichten, Komponenten und Technologie-Stack auf Deutsch.

API Documentation

Interactive API specification with endpoints, request/response schemas, and security details.

Architecture Overview

System design, layers, components, and technology stack.

Backend Architecture

Spring Boot structure, controllers, services, and data layers.

Frontend Architecture

React/TypeScript structure, components, and state management.

Security Architecture

Authentication, authorization, JWT, and role-based access control.

Deployment Strategy

Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployment.

Testing Architecture

Test pyramid, unit tests, integration tests, and security testing.

Design Decisions

Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) and technical justifications.

Code Coverage Report

JaCoCo coverage analysis showing test execution breadth and quality metrics.

StockEase - Inventory Management System
